v0_coverage_policy.pr_103_all_official_annual_fixture_recor: PR-103 must populate all official-source-available annual/season fixture records for the defined v0 coverage window, not one sample per group.
v0_coverage_policy.pr_104_all_official_rolling_racecard_rec: PR-104 must populate all official-source-available rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily info records for the defined v0 coverage window, not one sample per group.
v0_coverage_policy.pending_racecard_visibility: If a racecard is not yet officially available, the annual fixture must remain visible with status such as pending_racecard, time_pending_official_racecard, source_not_yet_published, or needs_manual_review.
v0_coverage_policy.unresolved_items_not_dropped: Unresolved items must not be dropped.
v0_coverage_policy.missing_structured_source_data_explicit: Missing structured source data must be represented explicitly with status, not silently excluded.

five_pr_path.PR-102: ingestion data model and source plan
five_pr_path.PR-103: annual/season fixture data for all official-source-available records in the v0 coverage window
five_pr_path.PR-104: rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily info data with first-race and all-race times where officially available
five_pr_path.PR-105: merged user-facing timetable data and /major-countries/timetable/ UI

racecard_entries_declarations_daily_info.label: JRA annual race calendar meeting rows

source_priority.rule: Use official racecard, entries, declarations, daily race information, fields, acceptances, first-race, or per-race time sources when available; these confirm first-race and all-race times for display.
Use official rolling fixture or meeting update sources when racecard-level data is not yet published.
Use official annual or season fixture sources as candidate meeting visibility until rolling or racecard sources confirm final times.

records.update_frequency: manual static source review for v0 coverage window; parser, cron, and source-specific automation deferred
